channel.title: Murmur
channel.description: Updates for Murmur, private on-device speech-to-text for macOS.

item.title: Version 0.4.2
item.description:
Murmur is private, on-device speech-to-text for macOS. This is the first public release.

  • Dictation anywhere: hold a key, speak, and the text is typed at your cursor. Four interaction modes, a configurable hotkey, and your clipboard is preserved.
  • Meeting capture: records your mic and the system audio as two tracks, merged into one chronological, speaker-labelled transcript.
  • File import: drop in a voice memo or audio file to transcribe it.
  • Never loses a recording: audio streams to disk continuously and is recovered after a crash.
  • History: searchable, with bulk delete, a 30-day Recently Deleted, and auto-delete of old recordings.
  • Optional on-device AI: a one-line summary and stutter cleanup per transcript.
  • Fully private: runs entirely on your Mac (NVIDIA Parakeet on the Neural Engine); understands German, English, Dutch and more. Nothing is sent to the cloud.
